appliedUpdates.description: Added setup note: synthesis milestone requires 'uv sync --extra synthesis' to install tree-sitter-language-pack optional dependency. Without it, AST parsing tests and end-to-end pipeline tests fail.

notes: VAL-SYNTH-05 was initially reported as fail by a flow validator due to missing tree-sitter-language-pack optional dependency. After installing via 'uv sync --extra synthesis', all 206 synthesis tests passed (41 pipeline, 74 dataset, 53 AST parser, 38 mutation). The code correctly handles the missing dependency gracefully (logs warning, skips mutation per VAL-SYNTH-06) but cannot produce tasks without AST parsing. This is an environment setup issue, not a code defect.
